tasks.title: Scaffold Laravel 12 backend
tasks.notes: DONE — Laravel 12.12.2, .env configured, Sanctum, vhost updated.

tasks.title: Scaffold React 19.2 frontend
tasks.notes: DONE — 160 modules, builds clean. Edumel + Greeva templates integrated.

tasks.title: Seed database with course content
tasks.notes: DONE — 2 users, 1 course, 5 sessions, 10 exercises A/B, 15 site settings.

tasks.title: Wire frontend — public pages (homepage, course catalog, course detail)
tasks.description: Connect HomePage, CourseCatalog, CourseDetail pages to real API data via TanStack Query. Replace all static/placeholder content with live data from /api/v1/courses.
tasks.notes: DONE — HomePage, CourseCatalog (search+filter), CourseDetail (enroll flow), CertificateVerify, InsightsPage, InsightDetail all wired to real API.

tasks.title: Wire frontend — student dashboard & enrollment
tasks.description: Connect StudentDashboard, enrollment flow, SessionViewer to real API. Enroll button hits POST /enrollments, dashboard shows real enrolled courses.
tasks.notes: DONE — StudentDashboard (real enrollments+submissions), SessionViewer (A/B exercises, submission form), MyCertificates, QuizPage wired.

tasks.title: Wire frontend — admin panel (dashboard, users, courses, submissions)
tasks.description: Connect all admin pages to real API. AdminDashboard shows live stats, AdminUsers/Courses/Submissions pull from backend with pagination.
tasks.notes: DONE — AdminDashboard (live stats), AdminUsers (inline role edit), AdminCourses (toggle publish), AdminSubmissions (grade modal), AdminSettings + AdminSEO (site/seo settings) all wired.

tasks.title: Certificate generation & verification
tasks.description: Queue job to generate PDF certificate on course completion. Public verify page at /certificates/:uuid.
tasks.notes: DONE — GenerateCertificateJob, CourseCompletionService (A/B group aware), certificate Blade template (A4 landscape, gold/navy), download endpoint, storage symlink created.

tasks.title: Insights / Blog section
tasks.description: Wire InsightsPage and InsightDetail to GET /api/v1/posts. Admin post management via AdminPostController.
tasks.notes: DONE — AdminPosts.jsx (add/edit/delete modal), router + sidebar wired, postsApi confirmed. Build: 161 modules.

tasks.title: Queue worker + Analytics API
tasks.notes: DONE — QUEUE_CONNECTION=sync, AdminAnalyticsController (6 KPIs + 3 chart datasets), AdminAnalytics wired with ApexCharts (area/donut/bar).

tasks.title: Production deployment
tasks.notes: DONE — web.php SPA fallback, .htaccess updated, vite base=/, build: 163 modules. machinelearning.local serves React without npm run dev.

tasks.title: Dynamic SEO meta tags
tasks.notes: DONE — SeoHead component, useSeoSettings hook, public /settings/seo + /settings/site endpoints, GA4 injection, MainLayout wired.
